title: Fast Boot
description: A Modpack Focused around Performance and Visuals
body:
# A Modpack that offers you good performance **With Good Visuals** so that you can have the best vanilla experience.

The Modpack features Mostly performance mods but it also adds many mods for better visuals
for example: 
- Better Clouds
- Ambient Sounds
- Explosive Enhancement 
- Particular 
- etc.
